Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside The Court'S December 3, 2024 Sanctions Orders Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 473(B), Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jan-14-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: ALLAN WHITE, AND AMY WHITE's Motion To Set Aside The Court'S December 3, 2024 Sanctions Orders Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 473(B).

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar. The movant is to comply with SF Local Rule 3.0C(3) and file an ex parte in department 610.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/HEK)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2024 Continued To Feb-04-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to February 04, 2025, at 10:30am in Department 610.
Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)
